### Receive Inbound Webhook

Entry point: listens for POST calls on `/wf06770-document`. Use the TEST url while building, switch callers to the PRODUCTION url after publishing.

Next: Normalize Document Payload

### Normalize Document Payload

Custom JavaScript: Normalize incoming document records to a stable schema

Next: Reason & Act (AI Agent)

### Reason & Act (AI Agent)

The AI brain: reads the input, decides which attached tools to call (and in what order), then composes the answer.

Ports: ①→ Shape Agent Output · ②→ Capture Failure Context

⚠ failures exit via the error rail

### Anthropic Chat Model

Chat model powering the AI step (model: `claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929`). Swap providers here without rewiring.

Feeds **Reason & Act (AI Agent)** as `languageModel`

🔑 Anthropic API key

### Run Calculations

Math tool — keeps arithmetic exact instead of letting the LLM guess.

Feeds **Reason & Act (AI Agent)** as `tool`

### Think It Through

Scratchpad tool: lets the agent reason step-by-step before acting.

Feeds **Reason & Act (AI Agent)** as `tool`

### Shape Agent Output

Shapes the item: writes `answer`, `confidence`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Confident Enough?

### Confident Enough?

Two-way gate on `={{ $json.confidence }}`. TRUE continues the happy path, FALSE takes the alternate branch.

Ports: ①→ Deliver Answer + Log to MySQL · ②→ Escalate to Human Queue

### Join Outcomes

Rejoins 2 branches into one stream (mode: append) so downstream logic runs once.

Next: Save Execution Metadata

### Save Execution Metadata

Saves key fields onto the execution record — searchable later in n8n's execution list.

Next: Sort Documents Newest First

### Sort Documents Newest First

Orders items (newest first) so limits and digests pick the most relevant records.

Next: Summarize Run Stats

### Summarize Run Stats

Shapes the item: writes `runAt`, `itemCount`, `status`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Append Audit Row (MySQL)

### Append Audit Row (MySQL)

mySql — `insert` operation against the connected account.

Ports: ①→ Send Summary to Discord · ②→ Capture Failure Context

### Send Summary to Discord

discord — `action` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Discord webhook URL

### Capture Failure Context

Shapes the item: writes `failedNode`, `errorMessage`, `workflow`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Escalate Failure to Discord

# Distill documents with MySQL and Discord on autopilot

**Pattern:** AI Summarize & Route · **Level:** Advanced · **Trigger:** Webhook

## What it does
Distill documents with MySQL and Discord on autopilot. It fires the moment an external system calls its webhook.

## Why it exists
Manual q&a is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Receive Inbound Webhook → Normalize Document Payload → Reason & Act (AI Agent) → Shape Agent Output → Confident Enough? → Deliver Answer + Log to MySQL → Join Outcomes → …

## Use it for
- Teams that want to ai summarize & route without manual effort
- Anyone automating q&a in ai
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Has retries and error handling built in
- Scales without extra headcount
- Standardizes the process every time

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Anthropic API key; Discord webhook URL; MySQL connection; Slack OAuth2.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🛟 Error handling & retries

External calls retry **3× with 2s backoff**. Anything still failing exits through its node's error output into the red error rail → context is captured and the on-call channel is alerted. Set an n8n **Error Workflow** in settings as the final safety net.

## 🔐 Security

Never trust inbound payloads: the webhook path is unguessable. Add header auth or IP allow-listing for defense in depth. Secrets live in n8n credentials — never in node parameters.

## 🤖 AI cluster

Purple nodes form one AI unit: the root node orchestrates, sub-nodes plug in via typed ports (model / memory / tools / parser). Swap the chat model without rewiring anything else. Costs scale with tokens — keep prompts lean and cap iterations.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your q&a process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
